{{Infobox character
| name = Overlord (The Traveler's Gate Trilogy)
| appears_in = The Traveler's Gate Trilogy
| titles = Overlord
| affiliations = Grandmasters, Travelers, throne of Damasca
| introduced = House of Blades
}}

''See also: [[Overlord (The Traveler's Gate Trilogy) Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|[[Overlords]] are powerful figures tasked with the responsibility of keeping [[Incarnations]] imprisoned. They serve as leaders or authorities within their respective domains, such as the throne of [[Damasca]], and command [[Travelers]] who act as their servants. While some [[Overlords]], like [[Malachi]] of [[Naraka]], are associated with principles of justice and law, others may be viewed as tyrants. The role is highly defended against both land-based and [[Traveling]] approaches, making direct assaults on an [[Overlord's stronghold]] extremely difficult. The position is significant enough that the absence of an Overlord can be noted during times of global instability and war.}}

== House of Blades ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|The Overlord is a powerful being and a member of a class of entities known to children. This figure holds prisoners of war and possesses a level of strength that local villagers are unable to resist. While the [[Myrians]] have risen to stand against this power, the Overlord has previously received various requests for parley and maintains a Master of Household. After personally taking [[Leah]], the Overlord became the subject of [[Leah]]'s intent to discuss certain matters. Ultimately, [[Simon]] succeeded in killing the Overlord.}}

{{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|[[Leah]] intends to speak with the Overlord regarding certain matters.<ref name="tg-01-house-of-blades-c2">''House of Blades'', chapter 2</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|The Overlord is a figure who holds prisoners of war.<ref name="tg-01-house-of-blades-c4">''House of Blades'', chapter 4</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|The Overlord is a power that villagers cannot stand up to.<ref name="tg-01-house-of-blades-c5">''House of Blades'', chapter 5</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|[[Overlords]] are a class of powerful beings mentioned by the children.<ref name="tg-01-house-of-blades-c11">''House of Blades'', chapter 11</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|The Overlord has received requests for parley.<ref name="tg-01-house-of-blades-c16">''House of Blades'', chapter 16</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|The Overlord has a Master of Household.<ref name="tg-01-house-of-blades-c16" />}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|The Overlord is a figure the [[Myrians]] are standing against.<ref name="tg-01-house-of-blades-c17">''House of Blades'', chapter 17</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|The Overlord personally took [[Leah]].<ref name="tg-01-house-of-blades-c17" />}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|[[Simon]] killed an Overlord.<ref name="tg-01-house-of-blades-c22">''House of Blades'', chapter 22</ref>}}

== The Crimson Vault ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|The Overlord is dead.<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c2">''The Crimson Vault'', chapter 2</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|Each Overlord guards one [[Hanging Tree]].<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c9">''The Crimson Vault'', chapter 9</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|The Overlord is in an alliance with the [[Grandmasters]] and his [[Travelers]].<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c16">''The Crimson Vault'', chapter 16</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|An Overlord is a title for someone serving the throne of [[Damasca]].<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c18">''The Crimson Vault'', chapter 18</ref>}}

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|“I must speak with the Overlord regarding these matters,” Leah continued.<ref name="tg-01-house-of-blades-c2" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|“Do not fear. The Overlord has received our requests for parley, and our informants indicate that he may be willing to spare the remaining sacrifices from your village.”<ref name="tg-01-house-of-blades-c16" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|“We are armed and ready to stand against the Overlord.”<ref name="tg-01-house-of-blades-c17" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Traveler's Gate nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:House of Blades]]
[[Category:The Crimson Vault]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate characters]]
[[Category:Titled characters]]
[[Category:Travelers]]
